name: canshare-tnm9-female-genital-cervix-uteri-cn
title: NZ AJCC (9th edition) female genital cervix uteri clinical N category
description: A clinical regional lymph node stage (cN) of a cervix uteri tumour before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (9th edition).
